initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT AVG(total_runs_per_striker) AS avg_total_runs
FROM (
    SELECT pm.player_id, SUM(bs.runs_scored) AS total_runs_per_striker
    FROM player_match pm
    JOIN player p ON pm.player_id = p.player_id
    JOIN batsman_scored bs ON pm.match_id = bs.match_id AND pm.player_id = bs.striker
    WHERE bs.runs_scored > 50
    GROUP BY pm.player_id
) AS striker_totals;

WITH striker_runs AS (
    SELECT 
        p.player_id,
        p.player_name,
        pb.match_id,
        SUM(pb.runs_scored) AS total_runs_per_striker
    FROM player p
    JOIN player_match pm ON p.player_id = pm.player_id
    JOIN batsman_scored pb ON pb.match_id = pm.match_id AND pb.striker = pm.player_id
    WHERE pm.role = 'striker'
      AND pb.runs_scored > 50
    GROUP BY p.player_id, p.player_name, pb.match_id
)
SELECT AVG(total_runs_per_striker) AS avg_total_runs
FROM striker_runs;

SELECT AVG(total_runs_per_striker) AS avg_total_runs
FROM (
    SELECT pm.player_id, SUM(bs.runs_scored) AS total_runs_per_striker
    FROM player_match pm
    JOIN player p ON pm.player_id = p.player_id
    JOIN batsman_scored bs ON pm.match_id = bs.match_id AND pm.player_id = bs.striker
    WHERE bs.runs_scored > 50
    GROUP BY pm.player_id
) AS striker_totals;

SELECT AVG(total_runs_per_striker) AS avg_total_runs
FROM (
    SELECT pm.player_id, SUM(bs.runs_scored) AS total_runs_per_striker
    FROM player_match pm
    JOIN player p ON pm.player_id = p.player_id
    JOIN batsman_scored bs ON pm.match_id = bs.match_id AND pm.player_id = bs.striker
    WHERE bs.runs_scored > 50
    GROUP BY pm.player_id
) AS striker_totals;

WITH striker_runs AS (
    SELECT 
        pm.player_id,
        SUM(bs.runs_scored) AS total_runs_per_striker
    FROM 
        player_match pm
    INNER JOIN 
        player p ON pm.player_id = p.player_id
    INNER JOIN 
        batsman_scored bs ON pm.match_id = bs.match_id AND pm.player_id = bs.striker
    WHERE 
        bs.runs_scored > 50
    GROUP BY 
        pm.player_id
)
SELECT 
    AVG(total_runs_per_striker) AS avg_total_runs
FROM 
    striker_runs;
